sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Grid-based movement
special_mechanics.description: Frog moves in discrete hops on a grid-based playing field. Player uses four-direction joystick to hop frog once per input.

special_mechanics.name: Platform riding
special_mechanics.description: Frog can jump onto and ride moving logs, turtles, and alligators that traverse the river horizontally in opposite directions.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative/empirical data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no precise physics parameters, velocity values, or sub-pixel system details. Movement is grid-based discrete hopping rather than continuous physics-based movement. NES port from 1986 may differ from original 1981 arcade version.
